Description: Represents the content displayed within a MudXChat.

Parameters.Name: Class
Parameters.Description:
The CSS classes applied to this component.
Remarks: Defaults to null. You can use spaces to separate multiple classes. Use the Style property to apply custom CSS styles.

Parameters.Name: Color
Parameters.Description: The color of the component. It supports the theme colors.

Parameters.Name: OnClick
Parameters.Description: Occurs when the chat bubble has been clicked.

Parameters.Name: OnContextClick
Parameters.Description: Occurs when the chat bubble has been right-clicked.

Parameters.Name: Style
Parameters.Description:
The CSS styles applied to this component.
Remarks: Defaults to null. Use the Class property to apply CSS classes.

Parameters.Name: Tag
Parameters.Description:
The arbitrary object to link to this component.
Remarks: This property is typically used to associate additional information with this component, such as a model containing data for this component.

Parameters.Name: UserAttributes
Parameters.Description:
The additional HTML attributes to apply to this component.
Remarks: This property is typically used to provide additional HTML attributes during rendering such as ARIA accessibility tags or a custom ID.

Parameters.Name: Variant
Parameters.Description: The display variant of the component (e.g., filled, outlined).

PublicProperties.Name: ParentArrowPosition
PublicProperties.Description: The arrow position provided by the MudXChat component.

PublicProperties.Name: ParentColor
PublicProperties.Description: The color provided by the MudXChat component.

PublicProperties.Name: ParentVariant
PublicProperties.Description: The variant provided by the MudXChat component.
